raw_consumer_statement: I filed a dispute. The merchant posted a pending transaction credit so I closed the dispute. Approximately a week later the company reversed the pending transaction. I want to reopen the dispute and Citibank will not reopen it. The merchant, XXXX, continually makes these mistakes and contributes it to system glitches. I have had XXXX such occurrences in the last two months. Always given the reason " system glitches ''. In my mind they are committing fraud and the bank not recognizing this is totally unacceptable. I have contacted both the bank, 4 times, and XXXX, 6 times about this one matter.
